_comment: Laravel-specific MCP servers. This file is a FRAGMENT — copy/merge into your project's .mcp.json (project root) when using laravel-plugin. The plugin's hooks/installer (when available) will offer to do this automatically.

laravel-boost._description: Laravel Boost MCP — Artisan-aware tools for laravel-architect and artisan-specialist agents. Requires laravel/boost installed in the project (composer require laravel/boost --dev) and a docker-compose service named 'app'. If you don't use Docker, replace with: { "command": "php", "args": ["artisan", "boost:mcp"] }
